regime_read: ES & NQ moving together — broad agreement, more DURABLE directional signal. Trust the direction more.
narrative:
Macro backdrop —
[2026-07-07] US economic state (FRED):
  Growth: real GDP 2.1% (q/q ann)
  Inflation: CPI 3.67% YoY | core CPI 2.26% | core PCE 2.89% (Fed target 2%)
  Labor: unemployment 4.2%
  Rates: fed funds 3.63% | 10Y 4.49% | 10Y-2Y 0.35% (NORMAL)
  Consumer: UMich sentiment 44.8 | VIX 15.81

---
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (as of 2026-07-07 ~12:15 UTC)

1) MOVE-BY-MOVE READ / CATALYSTS
The tape is mildly heavy but not broken. ES is essentially flat on the day (-0.17%) and pinned right on its session VWAP (7575 vs last 7578.75), while NQ is the relative laggard (-0.98% on the day, -1.35% on the week) and sitting just below its own VWAP (29646 vs 29655). The read: tech is doing the leaking, broad index is holding. Prior-day price action shows NQ rejected from ~30094 and has bled toward the lower end of its recent range, whereas ES only gave back a fraction of its range (prior-day high 7602.5, low 7538.25). News flow is a wash — headlines note S&P/Nasdaq futures rising on a chip-share rebound, but the accompanying Iran/Israel/Hormuz geopolitical thread and OPEC+ raising output for a fifth straight month keep a lid on conviction. Nothing in the news set is a clean, single-direction catalyst, so I'm treating the overnight softness as a normal drift/positioning move ahead of CPI rather than a headline-driven directional break.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ (volume-at-price, NOT order-flow delta)
Caveat first: this is where volume traded over 5 days, not buy/sell aggression — true delta needs a CME order-flow feed. That said: ES POC sits at 7587.45 with a tight value area (7511.56–7590.37). Price is currently BELOW the POC and near VAH, so ES is probing the upper value-area shelf — acceptance back above ~7587 flips it constructive, rejection there keeps it range-bound toward 7511. NQ tells the more cautious story: POC is way up at 29981.94 and the whole high-volume node cluster (29954–30260) sits ABOVE current price. NQ last (29646) is trading beneath its value area, near VAL (29452). That means NQ has left the bulk of its recent accepted volume overhead — a structural headwind. Line in the sand for NQ: 29452 (value-area low). Lose it and the profile opens air toward the 5-day low ~29354.

3) NQ/ES LEAD-LAG REGIME
System classifies BREADTH: contemporaneous correlation 0.913, lead-lag best_corr only 0.047 with leader = NONE. Translation — ES and NQ are moving together, no clean leader, so directional signals here are more DURABLE and worth trusting on direction WHEN one appears. But note the flags: there IS a short-term divergence (spread_1d -0.816%, spread_5d -0.471%) with NQ underperforming ES. That's classic mild ROTATION-out-of-tech texture layered on a BREADTH backbone. Net: I keep the BREADTH call (the correlation dominates), but I discount confidence because the current move has no clean direction — it's tech-heavy chop, not a broad-agreement trend. Also honoring the system note: this is ES/NQ research only, no execution path.

4) EVENT-CALENDAR AWARENESS
CPI is 5 days out (2026-07-12, 8:30 ET — cadence estimate, treat as approximate). That is the dominant scheduled risk on the horizon. Practically: this week is a size-DOWN, don't-fall-in-love-with-a-swing environment. Any position taken now should be intraday-to-short-hold and trimmed well before the CPI window. No FOMC in the 21-day horizon shown.

5) SYNTHESIS — META-REGIME + NARROWED BIAS
Meta-regime: a durable-but-directionless BREADTH tape with a tech-drag rotation undercurrent, both indices comfortably above their 200-day SMAs (ES +8.6%, NQ +12.9%) — so the higher-timeframe structure is still bullish, but the near-term momentum is soft (NQ RSI 42.8, ES RSI 51.4, neutral). Because news is mixed and there's no clean lead-lag directional edge, I refuse to manufacture a strong directional call.

BIAS: NEUTRAL-with-a-cautious-fade-of-weakness lean, ~46% confidence. Concretely: NQ is below both VWAP and its value area with overhead volume — I do NOT want to be long NQ into that overhead supply, but I also won't chase shorts into a bullish 200-day structure ahead of CPI. The actionable frame: watch NQ's 29452 value-area-low. Holding above it = range/mean-revert chop (fade extremes back toward VWAP ~29655); a decisive break and acceptance below 29452 turns me tactically SHORT toward the 5-day low ~29354, which would ALSO be the cleanest short-term directional trigger given the BREADTH backbone. Upside invalidation of any bearish lean: reclaim and hold above NQ POC ~29982 / ES POC ~7587.

KEY INVALIDATION (NQ): 29452. Above it, stay NEUTRAL/mean-revert; below it with acceptance, the durable-BREADTH read supports a short.

HUMILITY NOTE: This scorecard is still CALIBRATING (n=11; dir hit-rate 0.818 but regime accuracy only 0.304 — not yet meaningful, need ~30–60 samples). Treat this as intelligence, not a validated edge. Confidence deliberately capped in the mid-40s because news is mixed and the lead-lag shows no clean directional leader.
